ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete in kg */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the athlete represents */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (Summer or Winter) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the game was held */,
  "opening_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "closing_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "noc" TEXT /* National Olympic Committee (NOC) code */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sport */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the sport's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the participation belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participation belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the athlete was part of */,
  "medal" TEXT /* Medal won by the athlete (if any) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the participation (e.g., time, score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete in the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_teams_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., goals scored, time) */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_statistics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the sponsor belongs to */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sponsors_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., time, score) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete recovered from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_injuries_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
